summary: Iteration 59 - Avatar Features Testing: All backend tests passed (11/11). Frontend PipelineView loads correctly with no console errors. Avatar modal, clothing options, and agent timeline features are implemented correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Avatar features fully tested. Backend endpoints work correctly with company_uniform default clothing. Frontend PipelineView.jsx has correct imports (Bot, ScanEye, ShieldCheck), clothing options with company_uniform first, clear-all-avatars button, and Agent Timeline UI. Translation files (en.json, pt.json, es.json) all have new keys: clothing_uniform, agent_scanner, agent_artist, agent_critic, avatars_cleared.

backend.POST /api/campaigns/pipeline/generate-av: Returns job_id and status. Polling returns agents array and active_agent field.
backend.GET /api/campaigns/pipeline/generate-ava: Returns status with agents array (Scanner, Artist, Critic) and active_agent field.
backend.POST /api/campaigns/pipeline/generate-av: Accepts company_uniform and all 5 clothing types.
backend.CLOTHING_MAP: Contains company_uniform in generate-avatar-variant and batch-360 endpoints.

frontend.Clothing options: 5 options with company_uniform first: Uniform, Business Formal, Casual, Streetwear, Creative (lines 2304-2309)
frontend.clear-all-avatars-btn: Present with data-testid, only shows when avatars exist (line 1864)
frontend.Agent Timeline UI: Shows Scanner->Artist->Critic pipeline with icons during generation (lines 2077-2107)
frontend.Translation keys: All new keys present in en.json, pt.json, es.json (clothing_uniform, agent_scanner, agent_artist, agent_critic, avatars_cleared)
